mapper.sql: select outbound_item.outbound_item_id, outbound_item.outbound_id, outbound_item.sale_order_item_id, outbound_item.product_id, outbound_item.location_id, outbound_item.batch_no, outbound_item.quantity, outbound_item.price, outbound_item.amount, case when outbound_item.sale_order_item_id is null then null else ( select sale_order_item.quantity from wms_sale_order_item sale_order_item where sale_order_item.sale_order_item_id = outbound_item.sale_order_item_id ) end as sale_quantity, case when outbound_item.sale_order_item_id is null then null else ifnull(( select sum(history_item.quantity) from wms_outbound_item history_item left join wms_outbound history_outbound on history_outbound.outbound_id = history_item.outbound_id where history_outbound.status = 'audited' and ( history_outbound.sale_order_id = current_outbound.sale_order_id or ( history_outbound.sale_order_id is null and history_outbound.source_order_no = current_outbound.sale_order_no ) ) and ( history_item.sale_order_item_id = outbound_item.sale_order_item_id or (history_item.sale_order_item_id is null and history_item.product_id = outbound_item.product_id) ) ), 0) end as shipped_quantity, case when outbound_item.sale_order_item_id is null then null else greatest( ifnull(( select sale_order_item.quantity from wms_sale_order_item sale_order_item where sale_order_item.sale_order_item_id = outbound_item.sale_order_item_id ), 0) - ifnull(( select sum(history_item.quantity) from wms_outbound_item history_item left join wms_outbound history_outbound on history_outbound.outbound_id = history_item.outbound_id where history_outbound.status = 'audited' and ( history_outbound.sale_order_id = current_outbound.sale_order_id or ( history_outbound.sale_order_id is null and history_outbound.source_order_no = current_outbound.sale_order_no ) ) and ( history_item.sale_order_item_id = outbound_item.sale_order_item_id or (history_item.sale_order_item_id is null and history_item.product_id = outbound_item.product_id) ) ), 0), 0 ) end as remain_quantity from wms_outbound_item outbound_item left join wms_outbound current_outbound on current_outbound.outbound_id = outbound_item.outbound_id
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_outbound_item
outbound_id, sale_order_item_id, product_id, location_id, batch_no, quantity, price, amount,
#{outboundId}, #{saleOrderItemId}, #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount},
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_outbound_item where outbound_item_id in
#{outboundItemId}

delete from wms_outbound_item where outbound_id in
#{outboundId}
mapper.select:
select distinct outbound_id from wms_outbound_item where outbound_item_id in
#{outboundItemId}
